features.name: mux_lowest_bit_equals_selector
features.description: Code should include a case statement inside always @* that creates a 2-bit mux where the lowest bit output equals the selector signal in one branch and constant 0 in another branch
features.snippet: always @* begin case(s) 1'b1: z = {f, 1'b1}; 1'b0: z = {1'b0, 1'b0}; endcase end

features.name: mux_high_bit_and_with_selector
features.description: Code should include a case statement inside always @* that creates a mux where one branch has a non-selector signal in the high bit and the other branch has constant 0
features.snippet: always @* begin case(s) 1'b1: z = {f, 1'b1}; 1'b0: z = {1'b0, 1'b0}; endcase end
